name: component-policy
rules: Before creating a frontend component, Codex must read ai/registry/components.json and every active component catalog.
Reusable controls belong in the shared component root and must be exported or registered before use.
Component registry entries should include id, name, aliases, purpose, props, path/exportedFrom, usedBy, and status/lifecycle.
Feature modules may contain feature-specific components only.

Generic controls such as table, form, modal, drawer, upload, picker, search, pagination, and date range are blocked in module-local components unless ai/changes/<current>/component-exception.md explicitly lists the file.
If an existing component covers the same purpose, Codex must reuse it instead of creating a duplicate.
